message:
fix(freeze): add sint optimization for all TypedArray types

- Add bytes_per_element parameter to native helper for proper element access
- Extend PATH 1 to accept any TypedArray (Int8/16/32, Uint8/16/32, Float32/64)
- Generate correct pointer casts based on element size:
  - bytes_per_element == 4: read/write as i32
  - bytes_per_element == 2: read/write as i16
  - bytes_per_element == 1: read/write as u8
- Fix get_length to return element count (data_len / bytes_per_element)
- Increase expr_buf to 512 bytes for longer expressions

This enables zero-FFI native path for Int32Array operations that
previously fell through to PATH 3 and returned undefined.

Test: Int32Array([100, 200, 300]) sum now correctly returns 600.
